filaments.name: PLA
filaments.description: Great for general-purpose prints. Rigid, easy to post-process.

filaments.name: PETG
filaments.description: Tough and slightly flexible. Good chemical resistance.

filaments.name: ASA
filaments.description: UV and weather resistant. Ideal for outdoor parts.

filaments.name: Nylon
filaments.description: High strength and flexibility. Requires dry storage.

filaments.name: PC
filaments.description: Extremely strong and heat-resistant. High-temp printer required.
